case_title: HSBC BANK NEVADA, N.A. VS. EVANGELINA S SALGADO et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-30-2011 CONTINUED TO JAN-30-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE NOV-30-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-30-2012 CONTINUED TO APR-30-2012 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE JAN-30-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HSBC BANK NEVADA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALGADO, EVANGELINA S $2,196.27 PRINCIPAL, $485.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $360.61 INTEREST, $334.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,375.88, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
